channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How can AI win the trust of doctors and nurses?
item.description: In August 2023, the American Medical Association surveyed over 1,000 physicians about their sentiments toward AI. The results, published at the end of that year, painted a nuanced picture.
item.dc:creator: Abdel Mahmoud, Fast Company

item.title: Copemar, en busca de la agilidad empresarial, avanza en su plan de digitalización
item.description: La empresa familiar dedicada en cuerpo y alma a la extracción, transformación y distribución de productos marinos, Copemar, da un paso adelante en su plan de transformación digital.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Biden admin to provide $750 million to North Carolina-based Wolfspeed for advanced computer chips
item.description: The Biden-Harris administration announced plans to provide up to $750 million in direct funding to Wolfspeed, with the money supporting its new silicon carbide factory in North Carolina that makes the wafers used in advanced computer chips and its factory in Marcy, New York.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: At the mercy of social media
item.description: I like Instagram as much as the next guy. I check in daily on my carefully curated feed of folks I follow and then work hard not to doomscroll the day away. One of my favorite follows is an adorable Corgi (aren’t they all adorable?) named Parsnip.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: El 67% del sector industrial ya utiliza la IA para la fabricación de productos
item.description: Desde su irrupción, la inteligencia artificial (IA) se ha perfilado como una herramienta poderosa para transformar el sector industrial.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Convergenza IT-business: la digital transformation diventa trasformazione aziendale
item.description: Se le imprese oggi non possono che essere aziende digitali, è chiaro che il CIO è anche un manager che “sa di business”. Quando si parla di digitale, infatti, si parla di processi e, quindi, di ruoli e attività che definiscono il modello organizzativo e di ricavo dell’impresa.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Internet Archive is back online after a cyberattack
item.description: The Internet Archive is back online after new of a cyberattack took out its digital library and popular Wayback Machine on October 9.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Google to buy nuclear power for AI’s energy needs
item.description: Alphabet’s Google said on Monday it signed the world’s first corporate agreement to buy power from multiple small modular reactors as the technology company looks to meet electricity demand from artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Tech consultant goes on trial in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The tech consultant charged in Cash App founder Bob Lee's stabbing death had no motive to kill him and in fact was forced to defend himself against Lee, who had become aggressive while on a multiday drug bender, lawyers for Nima Momeni said in opening statements Monday.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Elon Musk's Starship Success Halted by Coastal Commission, Personal Legacy at Stake
item.description: SpaceX's successful launch of the Starship rocket booster was met with a rejection from the California Coastal Commission due to Elon Musk's abrasive personality and political beliefs.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Tesla’s Cybercab, Robovan revealed with Elon Musk’s reputation at stake
item.description: The product launch in California didn't address how Tesla will make the leap from selling advanced driver-assistance features to fully autonomous vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: 18 Android settings that’ll strengthen your security
item.description: You might not know it from all the panic-inducing headlines out there, but Android is actually packed with practical and powerful security options.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Internet Archive data breach exposes more than 31 million user accounts: Reports
item.description: "Services are currently stopped to upgrade internal systems," Kahle wrote in a Thursday update. "We are working to restore services as quickly and safely as possible. Sorry for this disruption.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, NewsNation

item.title: Say goodbye to dead batteries with this portable wind turbine
item.description: The Shine 2.0 is a 3-in-1 portable wind turbine, charge controller and power bank that fits into a backpack and works day and night, rain or shine.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here’s what’s new in Office 2024
item.description: Microsoft has just released Office 2024, the new non-subscription version of its office suite. It’s available in three editions: Office Home 2024 for consumers, Office Home & Business 2024 for consumers and small businesses, and Office LTSC 2024 for midsize and large businesses.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez promises 'brawl' if 'billionaires' force out Lina Khan
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) vowed Wednesday there would be a “brawl” if wealthy Democratic donors attempt to force Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan out of a potential Harris administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Someone reinvented the toilet so that you can do your business anywhere
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how the Generation 2 Reinvented Toilet transforms waste into safe materials, a promising sanitation solution that could transform lives and communities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11
